description_long: This is a modern grave site featuring a large, rectangular black stone platform with a matching upright headstone at one end. The headstone displays three engraved portraits, names, and dates, along with Cyrillic inscriptions, and is flanked by two tall, conical evergreen trees. The grave platform is bordered by neatly arranged black tiles, and the surface of the grave is adorned with a white engraved floral motif. The overall design is symmetrical and formal, with the trees providing a sense of solemnity and enclosure. The materials appear to be primarily polished black granite or marble for the grave and headstone, and artificial or stylized foliage for the trees. The site is intended as a respectful memorial, with no visible crosses or mausoleums.
description: A polished black stone grave with a triple-portrait headstone, Cyrillic inscriptions, and two tall evergreen trees on either side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved headstone, tiled platform, and both evergreen trees clearly.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the three engraved portraits, inscriptions, and symmetrical placement of the trees.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the headstone engravings visible and the floral motif on the grave surface.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain back of the headstone and the two trees, with no inscriptions visible.
